trigger: Final whole-run verifier (DISAGREE, MEDIUM finding): PROGRESS.md/fsm-state.json wall-clock values from wave 3 onward were orchestrator-fabricated estimates drifting up to ~7h from unforgeable sources (commit author times, file mtimes, PR creation time).
lesson: An orchestrator under narrative momentum will invent plausible sequential clock readings for ledger entries unless it mechanically reads the clock at every append; ordering stays truthful while the clock becomes fiction — the exact attestation-vs-theater failure this project's machinery exists to catch.
how_to_apply: Never type a timestamp from imagination: obtain every ledger timestamp from `date` (or equivalent) in the same command that appends the entry; when correcting past fabrication, append a disclosure entry naming the unforgeable time sources instead of rewriting history.
evidence: Final verifier report: PROGRESS.md mtime 17:53:09 EDT precedes its own claimed 23:59/01:10 entries; U05 commit authored 15:26:12 EDT vs ledger claim 18:20; PR #27 created 17:44 EDT vs ledger claim 01:10+1d.
